nasb.text: Some of the bystanders were saying to them, “What are you doing, untying the colt?”

esv.text: And some of those standing there said to them, “What are you doing, untying the colt?”

cnv.text: 站在那裡的人有的問他們說：“你們為甚麼解牠？”

ccb.text: 旁边站着的几个人就问他们：“你们为什么要解开这头驴驹？”

csbs.text: 站在那里的一些人问：“你们解开驴驹做什么呢？”
